name: MSG91
description: Indian cloud communication API for SMS, email, WhatsApp, RCS and voice OTP with granular routing across 190+ countries.

seo.title: MSG91 — Messaging API (Email / SMS / Voice)
seo.meta_description: MSG91: Indian cloud communication API for SMS, email, WhatsApp, RCS and voice OTP with granular routing across 190+ countries.

when_to_use: Multi-channel OTP: SMS + WhatsApp + voice for India
RCS messaging with rich media for Indian brands
Email + SMS + voice unified communication API
DLT-compliant bulk SMS for Indian enterprise compliance

pros: Broad channel mix — SMS, email, WhatsApp, RCS, voice OTP
Affordable pricing for Indian and global OTP traffic
cons: UI and UX still feel India-SMB in places
Support quality varies by region and plan
Compliance documentation thinner than top EU/US CPaaS
review.verdict: Underrated OTP and notification workhorse — especially sharp pricing for global OTP and WhatsApp.
review.best_for: Product teams sending global OTPs, notifications and WhatsApp from India
review.not_for: Large EU/US enterprises needing polished compliance and support SLAs
